author: SypherPK
text:
Fortnite is actually doing it.
Fortnite C7 Season 3 is shaping up to be a pivotal moment in Fortnite history, and it's mostly thanks to 1 thing... Sprites. If Epic can string together a few seasons like this one, we may be headed into another prime for Fortnite. Enjoy guys.
